sql.if: AND ( A.MENU_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR A.MENU_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' )

mapper.sql: A.MENU_ID, A.PARENT_MENU_ID, A.MENU_NM, A.MENU_URL, A.MENU_LEVEL, A.SORT_ORD, A.MENU_TYPE, A.ICON_NM, A.DISPLAY_YN, A.USE_YN, A.SYSTEM_YN, A.REMARK, A.REG_ID, A.REG_DTTM, A.UPD_ID, A.UPD_DTTM
A.MENU_ID, A.ROLE_CD, B.ROLE_NM, A.CAN_READ, A.CAN_CREATE, A.CAN_UPDATE, A.CAN_DELETE, A.CAN_APPROVE, A.CAN_CANCEL, A.CAN_DOWNLOAD, A.CAN_MASK_VIEW
mapper.select: /* MenuManageMapper.count */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SMS.TB_MENU A WHERE 1=1

/* MenuManageMapper.selectList */ SELECT B.* FROM ( SELECT FROM SMS.TB_MENU A WHERE 1=1
) B ORDER BY B.MENU_LEVEL, B.PARENT_MENU_ID NULLS FIRST, B.SORT_ORD, B.MENU_ID OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
/* MenuManageMapper.selectTree */ SELECT B.* FROM ( SELECT FROM SMS.TB_MENU A ) B ORDER BY B.MENU_LEVEL, B.PARENT_MENU_ID NULLS FIRST, B.SORT_ORD, B.MENU_ID
/* MenuManageMapper.selectActiveRoles */ SELECT FROM SMS.TB_ROLE A WHERE A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD, A.ROLE_CD

/* MenuManageMapper.selectMenuAuthDetails */ SELECT FROM SMS.TB_MENU_AUTH A LEFT OUTER JOIN SMS.TB_ROLE B ON B.ROLE_CD = A.ROLE_CD WHERE A.MENU_ID = #{menuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY B.SORT_ORD, A.ROLE_CD
mapper.insert: /* MenuManageMapper.insert */ INSERT INTO SMS.TB_MENU ( MENU_ID, PARENT_MENU_ID, MENU_NM, MENU_URL, MENU_LEVEL, SORT_ORD, MENU_TYPE, ICON_NM, DISPLAY_YN, USE_YN, SYSTEM_YN, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{menuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentMenuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{menuNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{menuUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{menuLevel,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{sortOrd,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{menuType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{iconNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{displayYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N', #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'SYSTEM', SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: /* MenuManageMapper.update */ UPDATE SMS.TB_MENU SET PARENT_MENU_ID = #{parentMenuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MENU_NM = #{menuNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MENU_URL = #{menuUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MENU_LEVEL = #{menuLevel,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SORT_ORD = #{sortOrd,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, MENU_TYPE = #{menuType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ICON_NM = #{iconNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DISPLAY_YN = #{displayYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USE_YN = #{useYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPD_ID = 'SYSTEM', UPD_DTTM = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: /* MenuManageMapper.insertMenuAuth */ INSERT INTO SMS.TB_MENU_AUTH ( MENU_ID, ROLE_CD, CAN_READ, CAN_CREATE, CAN_UPDATE, CAN_DELETE, CAN_APPROVE, CAN_CANCEL, CAN_DOWNLOAD, CAN_MASK_VIEW, USE_YN, REG_ID, REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{menuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roleCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{canRead,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{canCreate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{canUpdate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{canDelete,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{canApprove,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{canCancel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{canDownload,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{canMaskView,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'Y', 'SYSTEM', SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.delete: /* MenuManageMapper.delete */ DELETE FROM SMS.TB_MENU WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
